description: Irish Coffee Glass Set of 2 Clear 23cl Tall Durable Glasses for Hot Drinks Irish Coffee Glass Set of 2 Clear 23cl Tall Durable Glasses for Hot Drinks Elevate your coffee moments with this elegant set of Irish Coffee Glasses. Designed specifically for serving hot beverages, these glasses add sophistication and comfort to every sip, perfect for Irish coffee, lattes, or warm cocktails. Key Features Set of 2 Irish Coffee Glasses Ideal for sharing a rich, warm drink with a friend or loved one. Tailored for Hot Beverages Designed to handle hot drinks while maintaining a comfortable grip and a stylish look. Generous 23cl Capacity Each glass holds up to 23cl, just right for traditional Irish coffee, hot chocolates, or cappuccinos. Elegant Design Tall, clear glass structure showcases the layers of your drink beautifully while adding charm to your presentation. Durable and Versatile Strong, quality glass construction suitable for everyday use and special occasions alike. Product Specifications Material: Glass Colour: Clear Capacity: 23 cl per glass Dimensions: Height: 15 cm Diameter: 8 cm Quantity: Set of 2 glasses Sip in Style Whether you're enjoying a quiet night in or serving guests after dinner, these Irish Coffee Glasses deliver the perfect balance of elegance and function. A warm, inviting addition to your drinkware collection.
